text.title: Subscription Lifecycle Edge Cases Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Subscription Lifecycle Edge Cases.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS audit finds upgrade webhook missing; users on $19 → $35 upgrade kept $19 price. Wires customer.subscription.updated handler. Tests all 8 cases. Dunning: 3 retries / 14d / cancel. Stripe Tax: on. Refund policy: 14-day full.
